name: Weekly activity log redaction sweep
_description: Re-aplica patternurile curente de redactie peste data/activity-log.ndjson. Util cand redact.js a fost extins cu noi patterns dupa ce log-ul a acumulat entries cu vechiul filtru. Ruleaza duminica la 04:00. Bypass Claude (deterministic), 0 cost token. Idempotent.
